steps: Go to https://app.docspring.com and log in or create an account
Choose between 'Test' token (adds watermark, free) or 'Live' token (production, billed)
Copy both the Token ID and Token Secret immediately — the secret is only shown once
To authenticate: Base64-encode 'TOKEN_ID:TOKEN_SECRET' and use as Basic auth in the Authorization header

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Token (Base64 encoded)
credential_fields.description: HTTP Basic auth credentials encoded as Base64. Format: base64(TOKEN_ID:TOKEN_SECRET). The Authorization header value is 'Basic {encoded_value}'.

notes: Authentication uses HTTP Basic auth with token_id as username and token_secret as password
Token Secret is only shown once at creation — save it immediately
Test tokens add a watermark to all generated PDFs and do not incur charges
Live tokens generate production PDFs and are billed per submission
Free plan available with limited submissions per month
